description: This node provides information provided by Index controllers.

fields.User: The user to get controller information from.
fields.Node: The controller side to get information from.
fields.IsActive: Bool for showing if the device is active. Useful for troubleshooting if your controller is not responding.
fields.Type: The controller type being used. (type of IndexController if exists or ``null``)
fields.BatteryLevel: The battery level of this controller. (``1``: full, ``0``: empty)
fields.BatteryCharging: Shows if the battery is currently charging.
fields.ButtonA: Shows if the A button is being pressed.
fields.ButtonB: Shows if the B button is being pressed.
fields.ButtonA_Touch: Shows if the capacitive touch is being pressed on A button.
fields.ButtonB_Touch: Shows if the capacitive touch is being pressed on B button.
fields.Grip: Shows the strength of the grip on the device. (from ``0`` to ``1``)
fields.GripTouch: Shows if the grip is being touched.
fields.GripClick: Shows if the grip is being gripped enough to trigger a grab action.
fields.Joystick: The position of this controller's joystick. (``[-1; -1]``: backward left, ``[+1; +1]``: forward right, ``[0; 0]``: resting position)
fields.JoystickTouch: Is the controller's joystick being touched right now.
fields.JoystickClick: Is the controller's joystick clicked down right now.
fields.Trigger: Shows the strength of the trigger while pressed. (from ``0`` to ``1``)
fields.TriggerTouch: Shows if the trigger is being touched.
fields.TriggerClick: Shows if the trigger is pushed enough to trigger a click action.
fields.Touchpad: Shows the X and Y of the area where the Touchpad is touched. (``[-1; -1]``: bottom left, ``[+1; +1]``: top right, ``[0; 0]`` when untouched)
fields.TouchpadTouch: Shows if the touchpad being touched.
fields.TouchpadPress: Shows if the touchpad being touched enough to trigger a click action.
fields.TouchpadForce: Shows the strength of the touch on the touchpad. (from ``0`` to ``1``)
